title: Ropedia Xperience-10M Task Suite Reproducibility Matrix

steps.expected: annotation.hdf5 plus public sample MP4 streams under data/sample/xperience-10m-sample; optional visualization.rrd can be inspected with Rerun 0.29.0
steps.boundary: sample card lists cc-by-nc-4.0; raw sample data is downloaded from upstream, not redistributed here

steps.expected: minimal baseline metrics and model weights under results/min_*
12 task metrics, predictions, manifests, and neural_mlp task-head artifacts
steps.boundary: 8,378-d current feature contract; audio documented but not featurized

steps.expected: research-direction taxonomy, extension probes, and task walkthrough artifacts
steps.boundary: single-episode probes, not full research-direction solutions
offline committed-fact audit; does not fetch private gated data
defines single-episode task evaluation rules; does not add cross-episode model quality

steps.command: python scripts/generate_visualizations.py && python scripts/render_overview_figures.py && python scripts/render_task_suite_infographic.py && python scripts/export_modality_atlas_assets.py && python scripts/build_figure_index.py
steps.expected: website JSON bundles, charts, overview figures, task-suite infographic, responsive modality atlas assets, FIGURE_INDEX.md, and docs/data/figure_index.json
steps.boundary: figures are generated presentation layers over committed metrics and sample thumbnails

steps.command: python scripts/validate_website_integrity.py && python scripts/validate_scope_claims.py && python scripts/build_artifact_index.py && python scripts/validate_mirror_parity.py && python scripts/validate_publication_package.py
steps.expected: docs/data/website_integrity.json, docs/data/scope_claims_audit.json, docs/data/artifact_index.json, docs/data/mirror_parity.json, and docs/data/publication_audit.json
steps.boundary: checks local website integrity plus public repo, prepared HF bundles, and prepared mirror parity

steps.command: scripts/omni/discover_xperience10m_sources.py then scripts/omni/train_qwen3_omni_lora.py after 32 valid episodes exist
steps.expected: held-out episode LoRA pilot metrics after data gate passes
steps.boundary: blocked by gated full Xperience-10M access; no 32-episode metric is claimed
